name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Breed Series Maine Coon Hypoallergenic 1.5kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Maine Coon Adult Cat Food is a super-premium dry diet for cats 12+ months. Supports digestion, joint health, immunity, dental care, and a shiny coat.
description: Complete & Balanced Super Premium Dry Food for Maine Coon Cats (12+ Months) Reflex Plus Maine Coon Adult Cat Food is a complete and balanced dry diet specially formulated for Maine Coon cats over 12 months old. Made with high-quality animal proteins, it provides optimal nutrition to support overall health, joint mobility, digestion, dental care, and a shiny, healthy coat. Enriched with functional ingredients such as prebiotics, L-carnitine, glucosamine, chondroitin sulfate, brown algae, and marigold extract, this food supports immune health, energy metabolism, joint flexibility, oral hygiene, skin, and coat condition. Key Benefits Formulated specifically for Maine Coon cats (12+ months) 89% of total protein comes from premium animal ingredients Supports immune and digestive system health (FOS & MOS prebiotics) Promotes joint health and flexibility (Glucosamine & Chondroitin Sulfate) Supports oral and dental health (Brown Algae) Contributes to healthy skin and coat (Marigold Extract) Boosts energy metabolism (L-Carnitine) Rich in antioxidants and essential vitamins Ingredients Processed chicken protein (33%), Corn, Rice, Chicken fat, Corn gluten, Hydrolyzed chicken protein, Fish protein, Fish oil, Liver aroma, Fiber concentrate, Egg protein, Psyllium fiber, Nucleotide yeast protein, Vitamins and minerals, Dried brewer's yeast, Brown algae, Cranberry, MOS (mannan oligosaccharides), Flaxseed, Yucca schidigera, Salt, L-carnitine, FOS (fructo-oligosaccharides), Glucosamine, Chondroitin sulfate, Marigold extract, Preservatives – antioxidants (E320 & E321).   Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 32% Crude Fat: 17% Crude Ash: 7.5% Crude Fibre: 3.2% Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin A: 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E: 200 mg/kg Vitamin C: 200 mg/kg B Vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, Biotin, Folic Acid), Vitamin K3, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate Taurine: 1,500 mg/kg Minerals: Iron, Iodine, Copper, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium Feeding Guidelines Suitable for Maine Coon cats aged 12 months and above Feed according to age, weight, and activity level Provide fresh drinking water at all times Introduce any diet changes gradually over 5–7 days Store in a cool, dry place
